import pytest
from source import get_factors

def test_prime_number_returns_itself_as_factor():
    # Edge case for prime number
    n = 7
    expected_factors = [n]
    actual_factors = get_factors(n)
    
    assert actual_factors == expected_factors, f"Expected {expected_factors} for prime number {n}, but got {actual_factors}"
